problem id: 934a2c55
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  11001101 -> 00011011
  01011000 -> 10110000
  00001100 -> 00011000
  10110000 -> 01100001
  01111100 -> 11111000
  10110111 -> 11101111
  10100000 -> 01000001
  00111000 -> 01110000
  00000111 -> 10001110

query: 11010101
predicted answer: 00101011
